programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!
programme.desc: Podo Pooch turns Kitty into a proper superstar, and Kitty's friends start treating her differently.

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!
programme.desc: When Vastus loses his beloved plushie, Squidous the Muscular, he asks Detective Kitty for help tracking it down... without letting anyone know what they're looking for.

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!
programme.desc: Zonty is frustrated he didn't get cast as the prince in PI's play. He creates a robot version of himself to act in his place. But when his plan backfires, it's up to Artist Kitty to save the play.

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!
programme.desc: Kitty, Frido, Zonty, Pinky and Rio form a band, but their bickering causes them to split. Pop Star Kitty must reunite them in time for their first concert.

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!
programme.desc: Zing and Kitty team up with Rio in a special competition, but Zing is afraid he'll make them lose. Athlete Kitty helps Zing understand Rio has his own skills to bring to the team.

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!
programme.desc: DB accidentally eats all the sparkleberries Nori was planning to use in his next dessert. He tries covering it up while Detective Kitty investigates.

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!
programme.desc: After the Beavers get Construction Kitty to do their to-do list of repairs for them so they can go to the beach, Frido steps up and helps Kitty learn how to say "no".

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!
programme.desc: Construction Kitty builds Nori a robotic helper to concoct the perfect smoothie. When the electronic chef rebels, Nori and Kitty must defeat it in a Smoothie Showdown.

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!
programme.desc: Explorer Kitty covers for PI at the museum to allow him to enjoy his new hobby: weightlifting. But she unintentionally awakens an ancient and powerful Penguinese statue!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie show the pampered and spoiled, but lonely Prince Orloff what fun and playing is all about. Or at least Odie does, while Garfield watches.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When a mole's tunnel collapses Jon's yard, affecting Garfield's friends, the strays, and squirrels, Garfield comes up with a master plan that just might solve everyone's problems.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon is birdsitting his editor's parrot, Paxton, while Odie is away. But soon Paxton's doom and gloom attitude is bringing everyone down. Not even Garfield can help him but maybe someone else can...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's something very strange going on with the weather in town when it starts to rain sandwiches after a massive heatwave.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon, Odie, Garfield, and the twin follow what seems to be the source of the bizarre weather: a single cloud. It leads them to something and someone they could never have imagined.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There is a space invasion under Jon Arbuckle's roof, and the aliens are looking very much like Garfield's favourite meal: lasagnas.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Squeak and his mice family have taken up residence in Garfield's house, to Jon's despair, who will deprive Garfield of lasagnas if he doesn't turn things back to normal.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's favourite restaurant, Vito's Pizzeria, is in jeopardy. The evil Mama Meany wants to buy it to expand his own restaurant, with the PizzaGrand 7000 capable of making ten pizzas a minute.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A mother bluebird is locked in a neighbourhood garage, so who will care for her eggs? That's a job for Garfield, who is sometimes quite a mother hen.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie is found by Al the Dogcatcher with no license on his collar so he puts him in the city pound with other stray dogs. Garfield will do everything to get his friend back.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie falls in love with a brush. Garfield becomes a little bit jealous about that and decides to make the brush disappear.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon finds an old accordion. It's unbearable for Garfield who totally dislikes this music. He will do everything to get rid of it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon has won a live turkey in a raffle and wants to prepare it for dinner, but he can't make up his mind to eat it. Neither can Garfield!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie are watching a horror movie... They're scared. Jon, who has forgotten his key, is knocking at the door. The two pets won't let him in until he's proven his identity.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is angry. A fake, secret agent is trying to steal the show and his popularity among his friends.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Garfield goes trick or treating and disguises himself as a scary Catzilla. But the real Catzilla has just escaped from the city zoo and will spread panic in Garfield's neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie has been thrown out of the house by Garfield and spends all night outside on his own. An alien crashes his UFO in the garden and loses a key part necessary to get back home!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal's owner has gone away on vacation and Jon has offered to look after Nermal while he's gone. Watch out, everybody! The cutest kitten in the world (he says so himself) is coming over for a week!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Who has stolen Pooky? After a night drying on the clothes line, Pooky has disappeared, and Garfield can't sleep without him.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's night-time and the full moon and the alignment of the planets are having a strange effect on Odie.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz's parents are coming over to meet Jon and Jon really has to make a good impression.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon goes to visit his brother, Doc Boy, who lives on a livestock farm. It's out in the country, and since Garfield is a real city cat, it's no picnic for him!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There is a Pet Show in town, and the winner will get a huge lasagna from Vito's restaurant. That's worth trying for Garfield. But Nermal is in the competition too...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's a new TV Show called "Instant Petmatching", which is about seeing if pets are matching with their owner. The result of the test is that Jon and Garfield are incompatible!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie finds the pot of gold at the bottom of a rainbow. The owner, a leprechaun, will grant all the wishes Garfield can think of.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie has found a strange, big bone in the garden. After some research, Garfield has found that it might be a dinosaur bone, and that could make him rich... enough for having lasagna forever, at least!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A salesman has sold Jon a cleaning Robot, which is very annoying to his two pets.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is really unhappy because he has to be on diet. And he's having nightmares about it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon can't manage to sleep. He's tried everything, to no avail. But Dr. Somnambulo has a new machine: the hypno-doron, still in work-in-progress.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz brings back an old mirror from her travels in Egypt. This one is enchanted and opens a door towards ancient Egypt where a Goddess, Neferkitty, has a secret wish: conquering the human world.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Two little devilish girls are coming visiting Jon. They really want to play dolls with Garfield and Odie, who only want to stay clear from them.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is stuck in a parallel world where cats have taken the place of humans, and vice versa!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon sends Garfield to Dr Whipple's Show in order for him to learn how to be a well-behaved cat.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield accidentally climbs into an outer space traveller's car, which sends him into parallel worlds.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Sir Leo, a famous TV Actor, looks very much like Garfield. So when he has to go on vacations, Garfield takes his place and gets to taste celebrity and glitter.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Our heroes are on a fishing trip. Odie saves a little fish and goes to explore the underwater world with Garfield.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz asks Jon to look after her goldfish while she's out of town. When Garfield finds this out, all he can think about is the great fry-up he's going to have.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Our friends are having a picnic by the lake. There's an extra guest: a cute little wolf, who will become Odie's new friend.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield finds a watch which can stop time.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Liz's birthday and Jon wants to offer her a special gift: a nice family portrait. But taking this picture will be a gruelling experience for Garfield, Odie and Jon...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Professor Bonker has a new invention: the "Virtualodeon", which will bring the characters of Garfield's favourite TV Shows right into his living-room.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Herman the Postman is going on holidays. He has left his round to the young Steart O'Meara, who hasn't yet encountered all of Garfield's devilish traps...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's winter and Garfield and his friends, Odie and Nermal, are competing for the price of "the best Christmas carolling singer". There are cookies at stake!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's cousin has passed away and has left his fortune to Jon and Doc Boy. But there's one condition: the one who will spend an entire night in a spooky manor will be the one to inherit everything.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: After Garfield slightly changes the recipe of Odie's birthday cake, it comes to life and spreads panic in town!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has been mean to Odie again. Left in the garden, he's taken in by a neighbour, Nathan. Odie is happy with this new friendship, but he soon discovers that Garfield wasn't that bad after all...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield takes us through the ages to tell us the history of dogs. As we know, he has a poor opinion of them, but an incident will make him change his mind. After all, all dogs are not useless!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is bored. He has nothing to do. Well, not exactly: watching Odie and the squirrels in the garden, there's fun ahead after all!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Eddie Gourmand has built a super attraction park, made completely out of cheese. Squeak and his friends beg Garfield to take them there but with Harry working as a security guard, it won't be easy!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Pooky has disappeared again, but this time, it's Nermal who finds it. He is willing to give it back to him at one condition: Garfield has to be really nice to Nermal for the rest of the day!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's cat instincts push him to climb on a tree. But how will he get down? Everyone tries to give him a hand, but they end up stuck in that tree! Now he's out on a limb; who will save him?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal doesn't believe in super heroes. Garfield does and he tries desperately to convince him. Even if that means disguising himself as Ultra Powerful Guy.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal doesn't believe in super heroes. Garfield does and he tries desperately to convince him. Even if that means disguising himself as Ultra Powerful Guy.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield receives a strange helmet which lets him read everyone's thoughts. He even catches aliens' conversations who are just about to conquer Earth! Garfield has to stop this plot immediately!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: After Odie dreams of being a super hero, Garfield mocks him for it. But when Garfield really gets into trouble, Odie puts his grudges aside and flies off to help him. And this time he REALLY flies!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal makes a bet with Garfield: if Garfield manages not to eat for a whole hour, he won't see Nermal for a whole month. Will Garfield be victorious ?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A caveman has been found in a block of ice. When Garfield accidentally thaws him, he falls in love with Olga. But if there's no caveman in the new exhibit, the museum will be ruined!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's a new employee at the pound: it's a robot with all the latest gadgets and it's job to make all the pets stick to the straight and narrow!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Tis the holiday season for Garfield and the whole gang. Jon has invited not only his parents and Doc Boy, but Liz's family as well, and so Garfield must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's Christmas plans take a turn for the unexpected, prompting Garfield to learn that there's more to Christmas than opening presents and eating!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield make the cutest cat in the country look ugly? It won't be easy but our orange friend is VERY motivated...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Ah! A pizza dinner in a countryside cottage, doesn't that sound nice? Yep, except when the house is haunted.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield get rid of Aunt Ivy, who hates animals? Garfield has an idea.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When the owner of an outer space fast food chain plans to turn all the inhabitants of Earth into chickens, Garfield becomes our unlikely hero.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A retelling of the history of the cat throughout time, as told by Garfield. But is it really a retelling of history, or a rewriting?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield, from now on, you're on a diet! Don't argue, it's for your own good!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Gravity-free cooking, have you ever heard of such a thing? According to Garfield, it's delicious...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Yahooooo! Jon has won the lottery!!! But... but where is his ticket?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Bad news: Jon's nieces are coming over! The ones who love to dress Garfield up? You got it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon has become allergic to Garfield. But what if the only solution is to get rid of him?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has always said he would go to the ends of the earth to eat lasagna. And that's exactly what he's going to do!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: In your opinion, who should you call to rid a house of mice? An exterminator, or Garfield?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie is accidentally sold to Mr. Allwork, an awful lawyer who wants to sue Jon, and Garfield must find a way to get him back or never be fed again!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon, Odie and especially Garfield have to put up with an unexpected houseguest with big demands and an even bigger appetite.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It would be fantastic to get tomorrow's newspaper today, wouldn't it? Jon could play all the winning numbers in the lottery and then Garfield could eat tons of pizza, unless...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: So Garfield's been working the fields like nobody else? Has he been hypnotised or what?! Well... anything's possible...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: What starts out as a romantic night at Vito's for Jon and Liz could end up in a marriage with children, all thanks to Garfield stomach.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield will stop at nothing to get his hands on Chef Squisito's lasagna, which his wistful student claims is the 'best lasagna in the world."

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is the unwilling guinea pig for his young neighbour's newest invention: a size altering ray.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When Nermal's revenge on Garfield goes wrong, Garfield finds himself roaming the streets with no memory of who he is.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has to survive a day filled with nothing but bad luck after crossing paths with Jonah, a sad black cat.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie and the people he has licked are somehow making everyone act like dogs: it's a canine contagion! No one will be spared without the help of Garfield, who for some reason is immune.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield must save a lost baby bluebird from finding a new home: Harry's stomach!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: What's eating Eddie Gourmand? That's what Garfield is about to find out thanks to a new invention that allows him to get inside his brain.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When Jon, Odie and Garfield are duped by items they've bought on the All-Buying-Stuff Channel, Garfield discovers it's going to take more than a polite request to get their money back.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's new super computer program, Millie, has taken over all the appliances in the house and will not stop until it has taken over the world!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: An emergency fumigation prompts Aunt Ivy to impose herself on Jon, Odie and Garfield, leaving Jon with the responsibility of yet another cumbersome character.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: What if every person in the world were just waiting for their call to be taken, their life always on hold? Garfield is about to find out.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has always stayed away from cat food, opting instead for people food. After seeing his stray cat friends being fed some, he remembers how that came to be.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When the leader of the lasagna planet, Parma, sends in a spy in the form of a cuter version of Nermal to gain information on Garfield's weakness, his mission to invade the planet may be compromised...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie have their own undersea adventure when a giant squid takes Odie and starts wreaking havoc in the city sewers.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's the tale of Penny Henny, revisited, as Jon tells the story of the chicken who believed the sky was falling all because of one orange cat.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When Jon unleashes a trickster genie in a bottle, he gets the tables turned on him and must grant the genie his three wishes lest he be turned into a frog.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Shrimpy the Elephant is being mistreated by Dr. Whipple. When he escapes, it's up to Garfield to help him stay hidden.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Captain Garfield's ship is under attack by a group of rival pirates, Rottweiller, Hercules and Wilfred, who are after his treasure.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Things soon get out of hand when Garfield gets his paws on Dr. Bonkers cloning ray.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield puts Vito's skill and patience to the test when he hatches up a plan to exploit Vito's "pizza delivery under 20 minutes or else the pizza is free" offer.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When Odie swallows a Mexican jumping bean, he becomes a doggy bouncing ball and takes Garfield for a wild ride all over the town.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon is taken by the police when he is wrongly accused of stealing Mrs. Shmidlap's bracelet. It's up to Odie to find out what really happened.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Bruno, an alley cat, is sick and tired of watching Garfield get waited on hand and foot while he has to live in a trash can. And so he decides to make Garfield's home his own.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Could this be the end of Vito's Pizzeria? Garfield must save the two loves of Vito's life from the hands of Brent Mogul, real estate tycoon.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Dr. Goodiegoodie, an old TV show Jon used to watch, is no ordinary show. It's the show that watches you. When Dr. Goodiegoodie sees Garfield being mean to Nermal, he decides to punish him...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Paddy the Leprechaun has brought the rain with him and ruined Jon and Liz's trip to the beach. Garfield and Odie think they're saved from the clutches of Aunt Ivy.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Squeak has the power to see the future. How you may ask? Garfield doesn't care so long as he can make big bucks off of it. But when's Squeak's new "power" suddenly runs out, it's Jon on the line!

programme.desc: Squeak has the power to see the future. How you may ask? Garfield doesn't care so long as he can make big bucks off of it. But when's Squeak's new "power" suddenly runs out, it's Jon on the line!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is preparing for hibernation. But sleeping for months when you live with others isn't so easy after all, especially when they can get you into trouble without you even knowing!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie show the pampered and spoiled, but lonely Prince Orloff what fun and playing is all about. Or at least Odie does, while Garfield watches.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When a mole's tunnel collapses Jon's yard, affecting Garfield's friends, the strays, and squirrels, Garfield comes up with a master plan that just might solve everyone's problems.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon is birdsitting his editor's parrot, Paxton, while Odie is away. But soon Paxton's doom and gloom attitude is bringing everyone down. Not even Garfield can help him but maybe someone else can...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's something very strange going on with the weather in town when it starts to rain sandwiches after a massive heatwave.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon, Odie, Garfield, and the twin follow what seems to be the source of the bizarre weather: a single cloud. It leads them to something and someone they could never have imagined.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There is a space invasion under Jon Arbuckle's roof, and the aliens are looking very much like Garfield's favourite meal: lasagnas.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Squeak and his mice family have taken up residence in Garfield's house, to Jon's despair, who will deprive Garfield of lasagnas if he doesn't turn things back to normal.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's favourite restaurant, Vito's Pizzeria, is in jeopardy. The evil Mama Meany wants to buy it to expand his own restaurant, with the PizzaGrand 7000 capable of making ten pizzas a minute.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A mother bluebird is locked in a neighbourhood garage, so who will care for her eggs? That's a job for Garfield, who is sometimes quite a mother hen.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie is found by Al the Dogcatcher with no license on his collar so he puts him in the city pound with other stray dogs. Garfield will do everything to get his friend back.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie falls in love with a brush. Garfield becomes a little bit jealous about that and decides to make the brush disappear.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon finds an old accordion. It's unbearable for Garfield who totally dislikes this music. He will do everything to get rid of it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon has won a live turkey in a raffle and wants to prepare it for dinner, but he can't make up his mind to eat it. Neither can Garfield!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie are watching a horror movie... They're scared. Jon, who has forgotten his key, is knocking at the door. The two pets won't let him in until he's proven his identity.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is angry. A fake, secret agent is trying to steal the show and his popularity among his friends.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Garfield goes trick or treating and disguises himself as a scary Catzilla. But the real Catzilla has just escaped from the city zoo and will spread panic in Garfield's neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Garfield goes trick or treating and disguises himself as a scary Catzilla. But the real Catzilla has just escaped from the city zoo and will spread panic in Garfield's neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie has been thrown out of the house by Garfield and spends all night outside on his own. An alien crashes his UFO in the garden and loses a key part necessary to get back home!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal's owner has gone away on vacation and Jon has offered to look after Nermal while he's gone. Watch out, everybody! The cutest kitten in the world (he says so himself) is coming over for a week!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Who has stolen Pooky? After a night drying on the clothes line, Pooky has disappeared, and Garfield can't sleep without him.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's night-time and the full moon and the alignment of the planets are having a strange effect on Odie.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz's parents are coming over to meet Jon and Jon really has to make a good impression.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon goes to visit his brother, Doc Boy, who lives on a livestock farm. It's out in the country, and since Garfield is a real city cat, it's no picnic for him!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There is a Pet Show in town, and the winner will get a huge lasagna from Vito's restaurant. That's worth trying for Garfield. But Nermal is in the competition too...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's a new TV Show called "Instant Petmatching", which is about seeing if pets are matching with their owner. The result of the test is that Jon and Garfield are incompatible!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie finds the pot of gold at the bottom of a rainbow. The owner, a leprechaun, will grant all the wishes Garfield can think of.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie has found a strange, big bone in the garden. After some research, Garfield has found that it might be a dinosaur bone, and that could make him rich... enough for having lasagna forever, at least!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A salesman has sold Jon a cleaning Robot, which is very annoying to his two pets.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is really unhappy because he has to be on diet. And he's having nightmares about it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon can't manage to sleep. He's tried everything, to no avail. But Dr. Somnambulo has a new machine: the hypno-doron, still in work-in-progress.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz brings back an old mirror from her travels in Egypt. This one is enchanted and opens a door towards ancient Egypt where a Goddess, Neferkitty, has a secret wish: conquering the human world.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Two little devilish girls are coming visiting Jon. They really want to play dolls with Garfield and Odie, who only want to stay clear from them.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is stuck in a parallel world where cats have taken the place of humans, and vice versa!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon sends Garfield to Dr Whipple's Show in order for him to learn how to be a well-behaved cat.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield accidentally climbs into an outer space traveller's car, which sends him into parallel worlds.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Sir Leo, a famous TV Actor, looks very much like Garfield. So when he has to go on vacations, Garfield takes his place and gets to taste celebrity and glitter.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Our heroes are on a fishing trip. Odie saves a little fish and goes to explore the underwater world with Garfield.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz asks Jon to look after her goldfish while she's out of town. When Garfield finds this out, all he can think about is the great fry-up he's going to have.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Our friends are having a picnic by the lake. There's an extra guest: a cute little wolf, who will become Odie's new friend.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield finds a watch which can stop time.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Liz's birthday and Jon wants to offer her a special gift: a nice family portrait. But taking this picture will be a gruelling experience for Garfield, Odie and Jon...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Professor Bonker has a new invention: the "Virtualodeon", which will bring the characters of Garfield's favourite TV Shows right into his living-room.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Herman the Postman is going on holidays. He has left his round to the young Steart O'Meara, who hasn't yet encountered all of Garfield's devilish traps...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's winter and Garfield and his friends, Odie and Nermal, are competing for the price of "the best Christmas carolling singer". There are cookies at stake!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's cousin has passed away and has left his fortune to Jon and Doc Boy. But there's one condition: the one who will spend an entire night in a spooky manor will be the one to inherit everything.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: After Garfield slightly changes the recipe of Odie's birthday cake, it comes to life and spreads panic in town!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has been mean to Odie again. Left in the garden, he's taken in by a neighbour, Nathan. Odie is happy with this new friendship, but he soon discovers that Garfield wasn't that bad after all...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield takes us through the ages to tell us the history of dogs. As we know, he has a poor opinion of them, but an incident will make him change his mind. After all, all dogs are not useless!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is bored. He has nothing to do. Well, not exactly: watching Odie and the squirrels in the garden, there's fun ahead after all!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Eddie Gourmand has built a super attraction park, made completely out of cheese. Squeak and his friends beg Garfield to take them there but with Harry working as a security guard, it won't be easy!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Pooky has disappeared again, but this time, it's Nermal who finds it. He is willing to give it back to him at one condition: Garfield has to be really nice to Nermal for the rest of the day!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Pooky has disappeared again, but this time, it's Nermal who finds it. He is willing to give it back to him at one condition: Garfield has to be really nice to Nermal for the rest of the day!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's cat instincts push him to climb on a tree. But how will he get down? Everyone tries to give him a hand, but they end up stuck in that tree! Now he's out on a limb; who will save him?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal doesn't believe in super heroes. Garfield does and he tries desperately to convince him. Even if that means disguising himself as Ultra Powerful Guy.

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal makes a bet with Garfield: if Garfield manages not to eat for a whole hour, he won't see Nermal for a whole month. Will Garfield be victorious ?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A caveman has been found in a block of ice. When Garfield accidentally thaws him, he falls in love with Olga. But if there's no caveman in the new exhibit, the museum will be ruined!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's a new employee at the pound: it's a robot with all the latest gadgets and it's job to make all the pets stick to the straight and narrow!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Tis the holiday season for Garfield and the whole gang. Jon has invited not only his parents and Doc Boy, but Liz's family as well, and so Garfield must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's Christmas plans take a turn for the unexpected, prompting Garfield to learn that there's more to Christmas than opening presents and eating!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield make the cutest cat in the country look ugly? It won't be easy but our orange friend is VERY motivated...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Ah! A pizza dinner in a countryside cottage, doesn't that sound nice? Yep, except when the house is haunted.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield get rid of Aunt Ivy, who hates animals? Garfield has an idea.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When the owner of an outer space fast food chain plans to turn all the inhabitants of Earth into chickens, Garfield becomes our unlikely hero.

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.desc: Gravity-free cooking, have you ever heard of such a thing? According to Garfield, it's delicious...

programme.desc: Yahooooo! Jon has won the lottery!!! But... but where is his ticket?

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon, Odie and especially Garfield have to put up with an unexpected houseguest with big demands and an even bigger appetite.

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has to survive a day filled with nothing but bad luck after crossing paths with Jonah, a sad black cat.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie and the people he has licked are somehow making everyone act like dogs: it's a canine contagion! No one will be spared without the help of Garfield, who for some reason is immune.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield must save a lost baby bluebird from finding a new home: Harry's stomach!

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show
